title: Quarter Volume Library Prep Step 4: Adapter Ligation
author: Opentrons
materials: The OT-2 will pause for incubation steps in an off-deck thermocycler.
Proceed with incubation on off-deck thermocycler, then either part-5 or part-6.

steps.title: Set up - be sure to...
steps.instruction: Set up - be sure to pre-cool the Temperature Module to 4 degrees C using settings in the OT app prior to running this protocol.

steps.title: The protocol will alert the user...
steps.instruction: The protocol will alert the user to ensure reagents are present on deck in sufficient volume.

steps.title: The p300 multi will use a...
steps.instruction: The p300 multi will use a single tip on the rear-most channel to pre-mix the ligation mix, deliver ligation mix to the mix tube, then deliver enhancer to the mix tube, mix, and deliver the mixture to the second column of the reagent plate.

steps.title: The p20 multi will deliver adapter...
steps.instruction: The p20 multi will deliver adapter to wells of the library prep plate.

steps.title: Using the second column of the...
steps.instruction: Using the second column of the reagent plate as source, the p20 multi will deliver the mixture to wells of the library prep plate, then mix.

steps.title: The p20 multi will deliver User...
steps.instruction: The p20 multi will deliver User dilution to wells of the library prep plate followed by a mix.
